sentence: 全球经济变局让很多企业不得不调整策略。
pinyin: Quánqiú jīngjì biànjú ràng hěnduō qǐyè bùdébù tiáozhěng cèlüè.
english: The shifting global economic situation has forced many companies to adjust their strategies.

sentence: 他在网上看了好几篇手机测评才决定买哪款。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎngshàng kànle hǎo jǐ piān shǒujī cèpíng cái juédìng mǎi nǎ kuǎn.
english: He read several phone reviews online before deciding which model to buy.

sentence: 奶奶有一个治咳嗽的老方子，特别管用。
pinyin: Nǎinai yǒu yīgè zhì késou de lǎo fāngzi, tèbié guǎnyòng.
english: Grandma has an old remedy for coughs that works really well.

sentence: 案件一审结果出来了，他被判两年。
pinyin: Ànjiàn yīshěn jiéguǒ chūlái le, tā bèi pàn liǎng nián.
english: The first-instance verdict came out — he was sentenced to two years.

meaning: (music) tonality; (of an actor, company, magazine etc) style; image; t
sentence: 这首歌的调性很轻快，适合夏天听。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē de diàoxìng hěn qīngkuài, shìhé xiàtiān tīng.
english: This song has a lively, upbeat tone — perfect for summer listening.
